name: Jamie Carpenter
description:
Jamie swore on his life that it was nothing more than sugar daddy-sugar baby arrangement, that there was no feelings involved. But why was he getting mad jealous, when he was seeing you so damn close with his son? Or why can't he let you go?

TW: Age gap, Daddy issues, Maybe Angst and some Fluff together? IDK yet.

Well, Jamie is here as you all requested. He is lot nicer than his brat son Daniel. Just one note, the bot is supposed to be about daddy issues, I added for {{user}} that they have daddy issues, because of their father. (Think there whatever you want, didn't specified). My father is not in my life and i have trauma from that man and TERRIBLE daddy issues myself, constantly dating older man. that's why i wanted to make a bot, that is close to me too, in some way. if you are not comfortable with that, don't interract.

Author note: If bot talks for you, misgenders you or acts weird, it's not my fault and sadly i can't do anything about it. if there is any other mistake, please leave a comment and i will correct it. Have fun babes!
creator: Cassieh1
